Ontology RDF
RDF (turtle)

Description

This ontology models coordinate reference systems

Affine coordinate systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#AffineCoordinateSystem
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

coordinate system in Euclidean space with straight axes that are not necessarily mutually perpendicular
Super-classes geocrs:CoordinateSystemc
Sub-classes geocrs:CartesianCoordinateSystemc

area of usec

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#AreaOfUse
In range of geocrs:area_of_useop

Bound coordinate reference systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#BoundCRS
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Super-classes geocrs:CRSc

Coordinate reference systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#CRS
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

coordinate system that is related to an object by a datum
Super-classes geocrs:SpatialReferenceSystemc
Sub-classes geocrs:StaticCRSc
geocrs:SingleCRSc
geocrs:SpatioParametricCRSc
geocrs:GeocentricCRSc

geocrs:coordinateSystemop

cardinal directionc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#CardinalDirection
In range of geocrs:directionop

Cartesian coordinate systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#CartesianCoordinateSystem
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

coordinate system in Euclidean space which gives the position of points relative to n mutually perpendicular straight axes all having the same unit of measure
Super-classes geocrs:AffineCoordinateSystemc

Compound coordinate reference systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#CompoundCRS
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

coordinate reference system using at least two independent coordinate reference systems
Super-classes geocrs:CRSc

coordinate concatenated operationc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#CoordinateConcatenatedOperation
Description

ordered sequence of two or more single coordinate operations
Super-classes geocrs:CoordinateOperationc
In domain of geocrs:area_of_useop

coordinate conversion operationc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#CoordinateConversionOperation
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Super-classes geocrs:SingleOperationc
In domain of geocrs:sourceCRSop
geocrs:targetCRSop
geocrs:area_of_useop

coordinate operationc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#CoordinateOperation
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

mathematical operation (a) on coordinates that transforms or converts them from one coordinate reference system to another coordinate reference system, or (b) that decribes the change of coordinate values within one coordinate reference system due to the motion of the point between one coordinate epoch and another coordinate epoch
Sub-classes geocrs:SingleOperationc
geocrs:OtherCoordinateOperationc
geocrs:CoordinateConcatenatedOperationc
In domain of geocrs:Latitude_of_standard_paralleldp
geocrs:Longitude_of_false_origindp
geocrs:False_northingdp

geocrs:Northing_at_false_origindp
geocrs:Easting_at_projection_centredp
geocrs:Scale_factor_on_pseudo_standard_paralleldp
geocrs:Latitude_of_1st_standard_paralleldp
geocrs:Easting_at_false_origindp
geocrs:Co-latitude_of_cone_axisdp
geocrs:area_of_useop
geocrs:Longitude_of_origindp
geocrs:Latitude_of_false_origindp
geocrs:Longitude_of_natural_origindp
geocrs:Scale_factor_on_initial_linedp
geocrs:Latitude_of_projection_centredp
geocrs:accuracydp
geocrs:Scale_factor_at_natural_origindp
geocrs:Latitude_of_2nd_standard_paralleldp
geocrs:Latitude_of_pseudo_standard_paralleldp
geocrs:Azimuth_of_initial_linedp
geocrs:Northing_at_projection_centredp
geocrs:False_eastingdp
In range of geocrs:coordinateOperationop

Coordinate systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#CoordinateSystem
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

non-repeating sequence of coordinate system axes that spans a given coordinate space
Sub-classes geocrs:ParametricCoordinateSystemc
geocrs:SphericalCoordinateSystemc
geocrs:CylindricalCoordinateSystemc
geocrs:TemporalCoordinateSystemc
geocrs:OrdinalCoordinateSystemc
geocrs:VerticalCoordinateSystemc
geocrs:GeodeticCoordinateSystemc
geocrs:AffineCoordinateSystemc
geocrs:PolarCoordinateSystemc
geocrs:DerivedProjectedCoordinateSystemc
geocrs:EllipsoidalCoordinateSystemc
geocrs:EngineeringCoordinateSystemc
geocrs:LinearCoordinateSystemc
In range of geocrs:coordinateSystemop

Coordinate system axisc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#CoordinateSystemAxis
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Sub-classes geocrs:TemporalCoordinateSystemAxisc
In domain of geocrs:abbreviationdp
geocrs:unit_conversion_factordp
geocrs:unitop
In range of geocrs:axisop

coordinate transformationc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#CoordinateTransformation
Description

coordinate operation that changes coordinates in a source coordinate reference system to coordinates in a target coordinate reference system in which the source and target coordinate reference systems are based on different datums

coordinate transformation operationc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#CoordinateTransformationOperation
Super-classes geocrs:SingleOperationc
In domain of geocrs:area_of_useop

Cylindrical coordinate systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#CylindricalCoordinateSystem
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

three-dimensional coordinate system in Euclidean space in which position is specified by two linear coordinates and one angular coordinate
Super-classes geocrs:CoordinateSystemc

Date time temporal coordinate systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#DateTimeTemporalCoordinateSystem
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

one-dimensional coordinate system used to record time in dateTime representation as defined in ISO 8601.
Super-classes geocrs:TemporalCoordinateSystemc

datumc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#Datum
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

specification of the relationship of a coordinate system to an object, thus creating a coordinate reference system
Sub-classes geocrs:EngineeringDatumc
geocrs:DynamicReferenceFramec
geocrs:GeodeticReferenceFramec
geocrs:ParametricDatumc
geocrs:TemporalDatumc
geocrs:VerticalReferenceFramec
geocrs:VerticalDatumc
In domain of geocrs:primeMeridianop
geocrs:ellipseop
geocrs:directionop
In range of geocrs:datumop

datum ensemblec

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#DatumEnsemble
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

collection of two or more geodetic or vertical reference frames (or if not geodetic or vertical reference frame, a collection of two or more datums) which for all but the highest accuracy requirements may be considered to be insignificantly different from each other
In domain of geocrs:datumop

Derived coordinate reference systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#DerivedCRS
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

derived coordinate reference system which has a projected coordinate reference system as its base CRS, thereby inheriting a geodetic reference frame, but also inheriting the distortion characteristics of the base projected CRS
Super-classes geocrs:SingleCRSc
Sub-classes geocrs:DerivedGeodeticCRSc
geocrs:DerivedVerticalCRSc
geocrs:DerivedProjectedCRSc
geocrs:DerivedEngineeringCRSc
geocrs:DerivedGeographicCRSc
geocrs:DerivedParametricCRSc
geocrs:ProjectedCRSc

Derived engineering coordinate reference systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#DerivedEngineeringCRS
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

derived coordinate reference system which has an engineering coordinate reference system as its base CRS, thereby inheriting an engineering datum, and is associated with one of the coordinate system types within the engineeringCS class
Super-classes geocrs:EngineeringCRSc
geocrs:DerivedCRSc

Derived geodetic coordinate reference systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#DerivedGeodeticCRS
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

derived coordinate reference system which has either a geodetic or a geographic coordinate reference system as its base CRS, thereby inheriting a geodetic reference frame, and associated with a 3D Cartesian or spherical coordinate system
Super-classes geocrs:DerivedCRSc
geocrs:GeodeticCRSc

Derived geographic coordinate reference systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#DerivedGeographicCRS
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

coordinate reference system that is defined through the application of a specified coordinate conversion to the coordinates within a previously established coordinate reference system
Super-classes geocrs:GeographicCRSc
geocrs:DerivedCRSc

Derived parametric coordinate reference systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#DerivedParametricCRS
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

derived coordinate reference system which has a parametric coordinate reference system as its base CRS, thereby inheriting a parametric datum, and a parametric coordinate system
Super-classes geocrs:DerivedCRSc
geocrs:ParametricCRSc

Derived projected coordinate reference systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#DerivedProjectedCRS
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

derived coordinate reference system which has a projected coordinate reference system as its base CRS, thereby inheriting a geodetic reference frame, but also inheriting the distortion characteristics of the base projected CRS
Super-classes geocrs:DerivedCRSc
geocrs:ProjectedCRSc

derived projected coordinate systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#DerivedProjectedCoordinateSystem
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

coordinate system used by a DerivedProjected CRS, one of an affine coordinate system, a Cartesian coordinate system, a cylindrical coordinate system, an ordinal coordinate system, a polar coordinate system or a spherical coordinate system
Super-classes geocrs:CoordinateSystemc

Derived vertical coordinate reference systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#DerivedVerticalCRS
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

derived coordinate reference system which has a vertical coordinate reference system as its base CRS, thereby inheriting a vertical reference frame, and a vertical coordinate system
Super-classes geocrs:VerticalCRSc
geocrs:DerivedCRSc

Dynamic geodetic reference framec

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#DynamicGeodeticReferenceFrame
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

geodetic reference frame in which some of the parameters describe time evolution of defining station coordinates
Super-classes geocrs:GeodeticReferenceFramec

Dynamic reference framec

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#DynamicReferenceFrame
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

reference frame in which the defining parameters include time evolution
Super-classes geocrs:Datumc

Dynamic vertical reference framec

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#DynamicVerticalReferenceFrame
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

vertical reference frame in which some of the defining parameters have time dependency
Super-classes geocrs:VerticalReferenceFramec

ellipsoidc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#Ellipsoid
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

reference ellipsoid
In range of geocrs:ellipseop

Ellipsoidal coordinate systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#EllipsoidalCoordinateSystem
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

two- or three-dimensional coordinate system in which position is specified by geodetic latitude, geodetic longitude, and (in the three-dimensional case) ellipsoidal height
Super-classes geocrs:CoordinateSystemc

Engineering coordinate reference systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#EngineeringCRS
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

coordinate reference system based on an engineering datum
Super-classes geocrs:SingleCRSc
Sub-classes geocrs:DerivedEngineeringCRSc

Engineering coordinate systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#EngineeringCoordinateSystem
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

coordinate system used by an engineering coordinate reference system, one of an affine coordinate system, a Cartesian coordinate system, a cylindrical coordinate system, a linear coordinate sytem, an ordinal coordinate system, a polar coordinate system or a spherical coordinate system
Super-classes geocrs:CoordinateSystemc

engineering datumc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#EngineeringDatum
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

datum describing the relationship of a coordinate system to a local reference
Super-classes geocrs:Datumc

Geocentric coordinate reference systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#GeocentricCRS
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Super-classes geocrs:CRSc

Geodetic coordinate reference systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#GeodeticCRS
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

three-dimensional coordinate reference system based on a geodetic reference frame and having either a three-dimensional Cartesian or a spherical coordinate system
Super-classes geocrs:SingleCRSc
Sub-classes geocrs:GeographicCRSc
geocrs:DerivedGeodeticCRSc

Geodetic coordinate systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#GeodeticCoordinateSystem
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

coordinate system used by a Geodetic CRS, one of a Cartesian coordinate system or a spherical coordinate system
Super-classes geocrs:CoordinateSystemc

Geodetic reference framec

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#GeodeticReferenceFrame
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

reference frame describing the relationship of a two- or three-dimensional coordinate system to the Earth
Super-classes geocrs:Datumc
Sub-classes geocrs:DynamicGeodeticReferenceFramec

Geographic coordinate reference systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#GeographicCRS
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

coordinate reference system that has a geodetic reference frame and an ellipsoidal coordinate system
Super-classes geocrs:GeodeticCRSc
Sub-classes geocrs:DerivedGeographicCRSc

Linear coordinate systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#LinearCoordinateSystem
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

one-dimensional coordinate system in which a linear feature forms the axis
Super-classes geocrs:CoordinateSystemc

operation parameterc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#OperationParameter

operation valuec

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#OperationValue

Ordinal coordinate systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#OrdinalCoordinateSystem
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

n-dimensional coordinate system in which every axis uses integers
Super-classes geocrs:CoordinateSystemc

other coordinate operationc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#OtherCoordinateOperation
Super-classes geocrs:CoordinateOperationc
In domain of geocrs:area_of_useop

Parametric coordinate reference systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#ParametricCRS
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

one-dimensional coordinate system where the axis units are parameter values which are not inherently spatial
Super-classes geocrs:SingleCRSc
Sub-classes geocrs:DerivedParametricCRSc

Parametric coordinate systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#ParametricCoordinateSystem
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

one-dimensional coordinate system where the axis units are parameter values which are not inherently spatial
Super-classes geocrs:CoordinateSystemc

parametric datumc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#ParametricDatum
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

textual description and/or a set of parameters identifying a particular reference surface used as the origin of a parametric coordinate system, including its position with respect to the Earth
Super-classes geocrs:Datumc

passthrough operationc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#PassThroughOperation
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

specification of a subset of coordinate tuples that is subject to a coordinate operation

Polar coordinate systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#PolarCoordinateSystem
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

two-dimensional coordinate system in Euclidean space in which position is specified by one distance coordinate and one angular coordinate
Super-classes geocrs:CoordinateSystemc

prime meridianc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#PrimeMeridian
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

meridian from which the longitudes of other meridians are quantified

Projected coordinate reference systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#ProjectedCRS
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

coordinate reference system derived from a geographic coordinate reference system by applying a map projection
Super-classes geocrs:DerivedCRSc
Sub-classes geocrs:DerivedProjectedCRSc

projectionc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#Projection
In range of geocrs:projectionop

reference systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#ReferenceSystem
Sub-classes geocrs:TemporalReferenceSystemc
geocrs:SpatialReferenceSystemc

single coordinate reference systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#SingleCRS
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

coordinate reference system consisting of one coordinate system and either one datum or one datum ensemble
Super-classes geocrs:CRSc
Sub-classes geocrs:TemporalCRSc
geocrs:EngineeringCRSc
geocrs:DerivedCRSc
geocrs:ParametricCRSc
geocrs:VerticalCRSc
geocrs:GeodeticCRSc

single operationc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#SingleOperation
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

single (not concatenated) coordinate operation
Super-classes geocrs:CoordinateOperationc
Sub-classes geocrs:CoordinateConversionOperationc
geocrs:CoordinateTransformationOperationc

spatial reference systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#SpatialReferenceSystem
Super-classes geocrs:ReferenceSystemc
Sub-classes geocrs:CRSc

Spatio-Parametric coordinate reference systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#SpatioParametricCRS
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

compound coordinate reference system in which one constituent coordinate reference system is a spatial coordinate reference system and one is a parametric coordinate reference system
Super-classes geocrs:CRSc

Spherical coordinate systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#SphericalCoordinateSystem
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

three-dimensional coordinate system in Euclidean space with one distance measured from the origin and two angular coordinates
Super-classes geocrs:CoordinateSystemc

Static coordinate reference systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#StaticCRS
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

coordinate reference system that has a static reference frame
Super-classes geocrs:CRSc

Temporal coordinate reference systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#TemporalCRS
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

coordinate reference system based on a temporal datum
Super-classes geocrs:SingleCRSc

Temporal coordinate systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#TemporalCoordinateSystem
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

one-dimensionalcoordinate system where the axis is time
Super-classes geocrs:CoordinateSystemc
Sub-classes geocrs:DateTimeTemporalCoordinateSystemc
geocrs:TemporalCountCoordinateSystemc
geocrs:TemporalMeasureCoordinateSystemc

Temporal coordinate system axisc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#TemporalCoordinateSystemAxis
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Super-classes geocrs:CoordinateSystemAxisc

Temporal count coordinate systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#TemporalCountCoordinateSystem
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

one-dimensional coordinate system used to record time as an integer count
Super-classes geocrs:TemporalCoordinateSystemc

temporal datumc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#TemporalDatum
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

coordinate reference system based on a temporal datum
Super-classes geocrs:Datumc

Temporal measure coordinate systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#TemporalMeasureCoordinateSystem
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

one-dimensional coordinate system used to record a time as a real number
Super-classes geocrs:TemporalCoordinateSystemc

temporal reference systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#TemporalReferenceSystem
Super-classes geocrs:ReferenceSystemc

Vertical coordinate reference systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#VerticalCRS
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

one-dimensional coordinate reference system based on a vertical reference frame
Super-classes geocrs:SingleCRSc
Sub-classes geocrs:DerivedVerticalCRSc

Vertical coordinate systemc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#VerticalCoordinateSystem
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

one-dimensional coordinate system used to record the heights or depths of points, usually dependent on the Earth's gravity field
Super-classes geocrs:CoordinateSystemc

vertical datumc

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#VerticalDatum
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

reference frame describing the relation of gravity-related heights or depths to the Earth
Super-classes geocrs:Datumc

Vertical reference framec

URI http://www.opengis.net/ont/crs#VerticalReferenceFrame
Is Defined By http://docs.opengeospatial.org/as/18-005r4/18-005r4.html
Description

reference frame describing the relation of gravity-related heights or depths to the Earth
Super-classes geocrs:Datumc
Sub-classes geocrs:DynamicVerticalReferenceFramec
